purpose: Present multiple viewpoints on a contested issue, allowing readers to understand different perspectives and form their own conclusion.
writingRules: Each viewpoint must be attributed to a named person or organization
Present viewpoints neutrally — no implied endorsement of any position
Each viewpoint must be supported by evidence, not just assertion
Missing viewpoints must be explicitly noted
Let the reader decide — do not steer toward a conclusion
seoRules: Use FAQ schema if debate is structured as questions
Include primary and opposing keywords for balanced SEO
